eventBookingsManageTab.title: Bookings

myEventsTab.title: My events
myEventsTab.description: Manage your events. Create new ones with a place, a dedicated address, or online.

myEventBookingsTab.title: My bookings
myEventBookingsTab.description: Find your event bookings. You can change the number of seats or cancel a booking.
myEventBookingsTab.emptyMessage: You haven't booked any events yet.

myEventBookingsList.cancelModalBody: Your booking for "{{eventName}}" will be permanently cancelled.

eventParticipationsTab.title: My participations
eventParticipationsTab.description: Events you participate in as a collaborator.
eventParticipationsTab.emptyDescription: You are not participating in any events at the moment.
eventParticipationsTab.cancelModalBody: You will no longer participate in this event. The organizer will be notified.

eventInvitationsReceivedTab.description: Accept or decline event invitations sent to you.
eventInvitationsReceivedTab.emptyMessage: Pending event invitations will appear here.

bookingLimits.lockedParticipationMessage: This event has already started or ended; your participation can no longer be cancelled.

bookingLimits.fullMessage: This event is full; there are no seats available.

deleteEvent.doubleConfirmMessage: This action is permanent. Do you confirm deleting the event?
